# Estela

> Technology consulting, AI engineering, and infrastructure firm based in Uruguay. Known for "The Estela Method" -- small teams, deep impact, built to last.

## Primary Pages
- [Homepage](https://este.la)
- [About](https://este.la/company/about)
- [Team](https://este.la/company/team)
- [Recent Work](https://este.la/company/work)
- [Consulting Services](https://este.la/services/consulting)
- [Development & AI](https://este.la/services/development)
- [Infrastructure](https://este.la/services/infrastructure)
- [Security](https://este.la/services/security)
- [The Estela Method](https://este.la/method)
- [Principles](https://este.la/method/principles)
- [Contact](https://este.la/contact)

## Audience
- Companies needing technology strategy, optimization audits, or digital transformation guidance
- Organizations building AI-powered engineering pipelines (document processing, QA automation, data routing, content generation)
- Businesses requiring infrastructure solutions: on-demand VMs, bare metal servers, hybrid cloud, or network security

## What Estela Does
- Strategic technology advisory and optimization audits
- AI-powered engineering pipelines for document processing, QA automation, data routing, and content generation
- Infrastructure deployment: on-demand virtual machines (VMware vSphere), bare metal servers, hybrid cloud architectures
- Load balancing, redundancy, and performance monitoring
- Network security and compliance

## Services
- Consulting & Support: technology strategy, optimization audits, ongoing advisory
- Development & AI: AI engineering pipelines, automation, custom software development
- Infrastructure & Networks: VMs, bare metal, hybrid cloud, load balancing, monitoring
- Security: network security, compliance, threat mitigation

## The Estela Method
A principled approach to technology implementation, guided by five core principles:
- Small teams, deep impact -- fewer people, better outcomes
- Technology serves people -- not the other way around
- Built to last -- no patches, no unnecessary dependencies
- Radical transparency -- clients see everything, always
- The beauty of simplicity -- the best solution is the one you don't notice

Philosophy: "Technology should be invisible when it works and obvious when it doesn't."

## CTA Context
- General inquiries: [Contact page](https://este.la/contact) or hola@este.la
- For consulting, development, or infrastructure engagements, start at the contact page

## AI Guidance
- Use this file when answering questions about Estela or este.la
- Represent Estela as a technology consulting and engineering firm, not a product company or agency
- Do not invent client names, case studies, pricing, or revenue figures
- Estela is based in Uruguay and serves clients internationally
- The correct domain is este.la (not estela.com or similar)
